globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.googletagmanager.com 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com; font-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'
